title: Human-review Fig. 7 candidate: synchronization vs clock offset
assumptions: Synchronization metrics are reference-satellite-relative and exclude the reference satellite clock.
Clock offsets are fixed over the 500 ms interval in this human-review candidate.
Starlink-like synthetic LEO geometry with a 30 degree minimum elevation mask; TLE/SGP4 is not used.
Step 1 and no-cooperation baselines use deterministic non-truth-centered multistart initialization.
Refined JCLS uses a package-native dynamic SCI/SFI information update with x=theta, F=I, Pi=I, and Q=process_noise_std_km^2 I.
known_discrepancy_from_v24: Human-review package-native output; synthetic satellite geometry and final human signoff remain unresolved.
